Heads up, these updates may not be available worldwide yet. Just because I have access to them doesn't mean you will yet.

Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: As organizations build applications for users across a wide range of geographies, it’s essential that generated experiences feel natural to each audience. Up until now, generative pages were only available in US environments, which limited global teams from taking advantage of AI‑assisted page creation. This update removes that barrier by enabling generative pages to be created and used worldwide. This milestone also provides mechanisms to support makers in producing content that matches their l

Power Apps.feature_name: Download wrapped apps directly from Dataverse
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: Deliver your custom-branded apps faster by downloading them directly from Dataverse. No more Azure Blob Storage setup means less overhead and smoother distribution, especially for teams working in virtual networks.

Power Apps.feature_name: Simplify wrap setup within wizard Azure integration
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: This feature significantly reduces the effort and expertise required to wrap Power Apps mobile apps. By eliminating manual Azure configuration steps, you can onboard faster, reduce setup errors, and complete wrapping much easier than before, accelerating app distribution to frontline users.

Power Apps.feature_name: Use CLI to discover, create, and wire connectors in code apps
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: You can build richer, more complex code apps by using manual development or coding agents, so your developers move faster from ideas to production. This approach shortens the path from ideation and prototyping to deployment, helping you deliver enterprise-ready apps sooner while saving development time and effort.

Power Apps.feature_name: Visualize the data in your view easily with Copilot
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: AI-generated visualizations from Copilot help you understand patterns, trends, and relationships in your data. You can easily turn tabular data into a chart. Plus, you can personalize the visualization to turn data into insights without needing any other analytical tool. With AI-generated visualizations, you save time and gain valuable insights faster.

Power Apps.feature_name: Fill forms faster with smart paste
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: The new smart paste option in Copilot's form fill assistance feature helps users fill forms faster and easier with text content from any source. Users can copy the content, select a button, or use a keyboard shortcut to smart paste, and get inline suggestions in the form based on the copied content.

Power Apps.feature_name: Direct SharePoint List Integration for the new Power Apps experience
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: This feature gives makers flexibility to work seamlessly in the new Power Apps vibe experience with SharePoint lists as a source for their data. It accelerates time to value, reduces duplication, ensures data stays governed under existing SharePoint policies, and simplifies collaboration by keeping data in familiar environments.

Power Apps.feature_name: Explore and visualize data with data exploration agent
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: Turn raw data into actionable insights effortlessly. By using Copilot, you can use natural language to create charts, apply advanced filters, and uncover patterns without relying on external analytics tools. This feature saves time, boosts productivity, and empowers decision-making by making data exploration intuitive and accessible.

Power Apps.feature_name: Use Microsoft 365 Copilot in canvas apps
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: When you add Microsoft 365 Copilot to your canvas apps, users can get answers and take action right where work happens, without switching between tools or searching for information. This approach leads to faster task completion and decisions, fewer delays caused by missing context, and less reliance on support teams and training to help users navigate processes. The result is improved productivity and app adoption, reduced operational friction, and better use of existing staff and resources.

Power Apps.feature_name: Use Microsoft 365 Copilot in model-driven apps
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: When you build Microsoft 365 Copilot into your model-driven apps, users can get answers and take action right where work happens, without hopping between tools or hunting for information. That approach means faster task completion and decisions, fewer delays caused by missing context, and less reliance on support teams and training to help users navigate processes. The result: improved productivity and app adoption, reduced operational friction, and better use of existing staff and resources.

Power Apps.feature_name: Enhanced experience for form filling with Copilot
Power Apps.product_group: Copilot for Power Apps makers and users
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: With the new capabilities and experience in Copilot's form-fill assistance feature, users can quickly and easily fill out forms using copied text content, images, files, and emails.

Power Pages.feature_name: Manage external authentication providers with granular controls
Power Pages.description: This feature gives you precise control over which external identity providers can be used on your Power Pages sites. It helps you enforce security, compliance, and privacy standards while maintaining flexibility for your team.

Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: With the introduction of the ability to restore accidentally deleted flows directly from the portal, organizations gain a powerful tool to maintain business continuity and minimize operational disruptions. This feature allows flow owners, co-owners, and environment administrators to recover deleted flows quickly and easily within a set timeframe. This recovery process eliminates the need to contact customer support for assistance. As a result, your teams can save valuable time, reduce downtime,

Power Automate.feature_name: Visualize desktop flows with flow chart view
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Designing automations becomes significantly easier when users can visualize the full structure of a desktop flow. The flow‑chart view helps makers better understand branching, sub-flows, decision points, and execution paths, enabling faster onboarding and reducing flow‑building errors. With a clearer representation of logic, teams can collaborate more effectively, troubleshoot issues faster, and confidently scale their automation estate.

Power Automate.feature_name: View machine and flow utilization in dashboards
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Get clear insight into how your automation workloads use machine capacity. You’ll know which machines your flows rely on and how well they’re performing. This means you can plan capacity smarter, cut down on idle time, and make the most of your infrastructure.

Power Automate.feature_name: View unattended run video logs in portal
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature enables faster and more efficient troubleshooting of unattended flow failures by making video logs centrally accessible in the portal. Users no longer need access to the machine where the flow ran, reducing operational friction, improving collaboration across teams, and accelerating issue resolution.

Power Automate.feature_name: Create and manage custom dashboard tiles
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature enables users to monitor the metrics that matter most to their role or team without relying on external tools. By allowing personalized visualizations directly within Automation Center, users can gain faster insights, improve operational visibility, and make more informed decisions.

Power Automate.feature_name: Debug flows using variable default values
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature is for makers who build and maintain complex desktop flows. You can test and troubleshoot flows faster by setting variable default values directly in the designer, instead of restarting runs or manually preparing inputs each time. This reduces debugging time, lowers frustration, and helps you iterate more confidently when working with conditional logic and complex scenarios.

Power Automate.feature_name: Automate PowerPoint presentations in desktop flows
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature lets you automate routine PowerPoint tasks right in your desktop flows. You’ll cut down on manual work, keep your presentations consistent, and free up time to focus on what matters most. Plus, it makes it easy to integrate presentation creation into your broader business processes, helping you work smarter and faster.

Power Automate.feature_name: Self-healing agent for UI/web automation in desktop flows
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: When a desktop flow fails in a UI or web automation action and can't find the corresponding element, the flow typically stops. This agentic, AI-powered functionality solves this issue by finding what element the application needs to interact with in case of an error to prevent the flow from stopping and allowing it to continue to work as intended.

Power Automate.feature_name: Connect to local AI models from desktop flows
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: You can now add AI to your desktop flows without sending data outside your environment. By running models locally, you’ll keep control of your data, meet privacy standards, and cut down on dependency on external services. Plus, you’ll make the most of the AI investments you already have, helping your business work smarter and faster.

Power Automate.feature_name: Automate administrator-level desktop applications in unattended runs
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: You can now automate desktop apps that require admin rights during unattended runs. This capability eliminates previous limitations, allowing you to streamline complex, high-value processes. By closing these gaps, you’ll improve efficiency, reduce manual effort, and strengthen your overall automation strategy.

Power Automate.feature_name: Run Python scripts using current Python versions in desktop flows
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: You can now use the full Python ecosystem in your desktop flows without the old limitations of IronPython. With support for the latest Python versions, you’ll have access to popular libraries and tools, making it easier to create smarter, more flexible automations. This means faster development, fewer workarounds, and more powerful solutions for your business.

Power Automate.feature_name: Get support for normalized schema import for data ingestion
Power Automate.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Automate.description: Customers with existing data pipelines or data products in data mesh mostly want to stick to normalized, efficient forms such as star schema. Power Automate Process Mining currently requires you to transform the event log into a single-table form, where attributes with small cardinality are duplicated. Support for star schema reduces storage volumes and speeds up ingestion performance.

Microsoft Copilot Studio.feature_name: Give read-only analytics access to users
Microsoft Copilot Studio.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: The Analyst role enables you to share agent analytics without granting editing or modification permissions for the agents. By using this role, you can share agent analytics with confidence, knowing your team gets the insights they need without any risk of accidental changes. Your analysts can independently review session data, explore themes, and track performance trends, all while you retain full control over agent configuration, publishing, and sharing.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Create Dataverse agent users with Microsoft Entra agent identity
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Dataverse.description: The feature enables secure, compliant management of AI agents in Microsoft Dataverse, which reduces risk and improves governance for autonomous and interactive agents.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Guided table selection for first‑time Dataverse sync
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Build your low code hyperscale backend on Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Guided table selection removes a major source of friction for first‑time customers syncing Microsoft Dataverse data to Microsoft Fabric. Instead of being forced to initially sync all Dataverse tables and later navigate a complex manage tables experience to undo unnecessary selections, customers can choose exactly what they need upfront. This feature significantly reduces onboarding complexity for new admins, prevents accidental over‑syncing of hundreds of tables, and lowers storage and compute c

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Chat and reason over Dataverse business data in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Enable AI powered business workflows in Work IQ with Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Allow Microsoft 365 Copilot users to search and reason over Microsoft Dataverse business data in Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Build Dataverse solutions with coding agents using Dataverse skills
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Enable AI powered business workflows in Work IQ with Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: By using coding agents, you can eliminate the need to manually create Microsoft Dataverse tables and solutions through the UI. Dataverse skills guide coding agents to connect to your environment and build solutions by using tables, relationships, forms, and views. This process also includes creating sample data.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Improve Dataverse MCP server quality with updated tools
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Enable AI powered business workflows in Work IQ with Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Microsoft Dataverse MCP improves agent tool routing with clearer tool boundaries, adds unstructured data search alongside structured records, and introduces business skill management from any MCP-compatible client.

Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Improved enterprise experiences in Power Platform
Microsoft Dataverse.description: This release significantly improves the reliability and operational safety of bulk delete jobs in Microsoft Dataverse. By making failures easy to understand and configurations portable across environments, admins can execute large‑scale data cleanup with confidence, reducing troubleshooting time, lowering support dependency, and minimizing the risk of costly misconfigurations in higher environments.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Automate governance with Agentic Center of Enablement
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature transforms governance from reactive to proactive with AI agents that detect risks, prioritize issues, and automate remediation plans, which reduces manual effort and risk.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Detect operational health issues across Power Platform resources quickly
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature enables organizations to detect operational health issues across Power Platform resources quickly, which reduces downtime and the cost of disrupted business processes. Not only can alerts be configured to run reliably every 24 hours, but users have the ability to configure them with a 1‑hour evaluation frequency. This helps teams catch degradations early, minimizing the need for manual monitoring or engineering intervention. By preventing issues from escalating, businesses save time
